title: prunella vulgaris f. leucocephala
intro: Prunella vulgaris f. leucocephala, also known as white self-heal, is a subspecies of the self-heal plant (Prunella vulgaris), a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. Prunella vulgaris f. leucocephala has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and supporting the immune system. Prunella vulgaris f. leucocephala can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
